---
title: "find_self_intersections"
generated: true
description: "Find genuinely intersecting (non-adjacent) triangle pairs."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.intersection`](../nitrix-geometry-intersection.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:find_self_intersections -->
```python
find_self_intersections(mesh: Mesh) -> Int[Array, 'n_pairs 2']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:find_self_intersections -->
Find genuinely intersecting (non-adjacent) triangle pairs.

Uniform-grid broad phase + segment-triangle narrow phase.  Face pairs that
share a vertex (adjacent faces, which always meet at the shared feature)
are excluded -- only true self-intersections are reported.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:find_self_intersections -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mesh` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle mesh to inspect. |

**Returns** `Int` — shape `n_pairs` × `2`. Integer array of intersecting face-index pairs (`i < j` per row); empty (shape `(0, 2)`) if the mesh is intersection-free. Host-side; not differentiable.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:find_self_intersections -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_pairs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
